overview.description: AI transformation agency building modular AI systems for mid-sized businesses
overview.description_long: BANDITS (legal entity: DoneByAI s.r.o.) is a Prague-based AI agency that helps ambitious mid-sized companies enter the AI era without hiring costly internal teams. They design and deploy deeply integrated AI agents and pre-built modules that automate real work within existing systems (CRMs, ERPs, SharePoint, etc.). Key modules include Scout (knowledge chat), Saddle (video/audio captions), Sheriff (Czech speech-to-text), Lasso (e-commerce product data), and Hub (AI control panel). Founded by Jiří Štěpánek and Kryštof Mitka; backed by Miton as a founding investor.
overview.tagline: Secure, rapidly deployable AI systems with measurable impact

history.origin_story: Founded by Jiří Štěpánek and Kryštof Mitka out of a conviction that most companies fail at AI because they lack the right implementation approach, not the technology. Miton joined as a founding investor even before the official launch.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague; Miton joins as founding investor

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: BANDITS is primarily an AI implementation agency building integrations and deploying third-party AI modules. Their value is in services and integration expertise rather than proprietary AI models; as foundation models improve and deployment tooling matures, the differentiation of a boutique agency narrows quickly.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The AI services and consulting market is real and growing, but highly competitive with large system integrators, global agencies, and hundreds of boutique shops. BANDITS targets mid-sized companies in the Czech/EU market, which is a viable niche but lacks defensible scale.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Backed by Miton as a founding investor, which provides credibility and runway, but investment amount is undisclosed and the company is very early-stage (launched November 2025). Revenue model is consulting-based with monthly retainers, which is serviceable but capital-light.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Early-stage startup with Miton backing and a serviceable consulting business model, but high AGI displacement risk as their integration and implementation services face commoditization. Miton backing and Czech-market focus provide some buffer in the near term.

metadata.notes: Legal entity is DoneByAI s.r.o. (IČO: 23610361). Company launched officially in November 2025. Also operates in Czech market under BANDITS brand. Pricing ranges from 10,000–100,000 CZK per AI module.
